title: Ember Carbon Intensity Monthly
description:
Get grid carbon intensity data at a monthly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/carbon-intensity/monthly?entity=Brazil&include_all_dates_value_range=true&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/monthly-electricity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Ember Electricity Data' pdf.
